overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, futuristic corporate facility from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks through dimly lit corridors into a server room containing a medical chair and illuminated server racks, featuring the Arasaka corporation branding.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark futuristic corridor with green accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dimly lit corridor toward the room entrance ahead

entered.detail: dark glass partition walls lining both sides of the corridor
rectangular overhead light fixtures providing dim illumination
green glowing strip lights embedded in the floor along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, dark corridor with glass walls and green floor accent lighting. The camera moves steadily forward toward a visible room entrance at the end of the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate server room with central medical chair

events.description: exits narrow corridor and enters open room containing medical chair and server equipment

agents.ego_description: entering the room and approaching the medical chair positioned against the far wall

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing sitting in the medical chair, visible as the camera approaches

entered.detail: futuristic reclined medical chair with red frame positioned centrally in the room
wall with distinctive hexagonal geometric pattern behind the medical chair
tall dark server cabinets with blinking indicator lights along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a server room from the corridor, revealing a medical chair against a geometric-patterned wall. A person sits in the chair as the camera approaches, with server racks visible along the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: server room with illuminated rack towers

events.description: passes the medical chair and turns slightly right to view the illuminated server towers

agents.ego_description: moving past the medical chair and observing the tall illuminated server towers on the right side

entered.detail: three tall server towers with bright yellow-orange illuminated panels stacked vertically
small two-seater couch positioned against the left wall near the server racks
stacked corporate crates with Arasaka branding visible in the back of the room

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the medical chair, revealing tall illuminated server towers on the right glowing with yellow light. A small sofa sits against the left wall, and Arasaka-branded crates are visible in the back area.

scene_state.functional_zone: back office area with desk and dark exit

events.description: ambient lighting decreases significantly as approaching the darker rear corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the computer desk and the dark exit corridor at the back of the server room

entered.detail: desk with computer monitors and equipment positioned against the back wall
large container with illuminated Arasaka logo text on the front
darkened doorway leading to another corridor section at the back of the room

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the back of the room where lighting dims significantly. A computer desk and Arasaka-labeled container are visible before a dark corridor exit, while the illuminated server towers fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile, dimly lit corridor into a high-tech server room that gradually descends back into shadow. It begins with a steady walk through a narrow hallway defined by glass walls and green floor accent lighting, moving directly toward a visible room entrance. As the camera enters the server room, the space opens up to reveal a person seated in a medical chair against a geometric wall, with server racks lining the left side. The perspective then shifts past the chair toward tall, yellow-illuminated server towers on the right and Arasaka-branded crates in the background. Finally, the camera pushes toward the rear of the room where the light dims significantly, passing a computer desk and a labeled container before reaching a dark corridor exit.
